text:
The Sonata of Darkness (, Yami no Sonata) is a piece of music said to be composed by Satan (, Maō—lit. The Devil/Devil King) himself. It is said that whoever performs or listens to it will be horribly cursed. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 73 

Background

The piece has solo piano, violin, harp, and flute parts. Melody heard the flute solo, which changed her appearance dramatically; her unnamed friend who played it died gruesomely. Melody was also given a supernaturally keen sense of hearing by the Sonata, but she said that she would return it to be the way she was. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Melody tells her story about the Sonata of Darkness to Kurapika, but he questions the Sonata's existence. Melody then rolls up her sleeve and shows him how the Sonata affected her. Though never revealed, the sight of her skin is enough to make Kurapika shiver. Melody reveals that she is now searching for the piece in order to destroy it. 

Trivia

In Crunchyroll's translation of the 2011 anime adaptation, the name of the sheet music is "Dark Sonata". Hunter × Hunter - Episode 42 (2011)
